criteria.criterion: DBB-001: No runtime error when kokoro TTS provider selected — adapter exists at src/runtime/adapters/voice/kokoro.js, registered in ADAPTERS map
DBB-002: TTS adapter map consistent with files on disk — all 5 adapters (macos-say, piper, kokoro, elevenlabs, openai-tts) exist and importable
DBB-003: Architecture gap scanner reports no 'missing' for kokoro — kokoro.js adapter exists on disk
DBB-004: Existing TTS providers unaffected — piper, openai-tts, elevenlabs, macos-say adapter files all present
DBB-005: All existing tests pass — 198 test files, 1193 tests passed, 0 failures
DBB-006: Dead code adapters/embed.js removed — file does not exist, no references in src/
DBB-007: vitest.config.js has no stale #agentic-embed alias — confirmed clean config
